canonical_definition: Textual entailment dataset based on Wikipedia claims, used in this work for connected reasoning evaluation due to its document-claim-evidence triples.
papers: AgentSense: Benchmarking Social Intelligence of Language Agents through Interactive Scenarios
Rethinking the Role ofLLMs for Document-level Relation Extraction: a Refiner with Task Distribution and Probability Fusion

definitions.text: Dataset of natural claims extracted from Wikipedia, used to evaluate fact-checking performance at the claim level with binary supported/unsupported labels.
definitions.paper: Rethinking the Role ofLLMs for Document-level Relation Extraction: a Refiner with Task Distribution and Probability Fusion
